Title: Excelente!
ReviewText: We went for breakfast and were helped by Mar who gave us excellent service. The food was excellent. I had the coconut pancakes with strawberries and bananas. They were huge! They also tasted great. My husband had the traditional Costa Rican breakfast which he said was delicious! Everything was fresh and delicious. A definite yes in my book.

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: We were served by Mar and was very friendly had excellent customer service and all the food was very delicious Super recommended

Title: Good times! Good food and great coffee.
ReviewText: Awesome . Marghel rocked the service …  awesome yeah baby!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Ambiance, decour, vibe and music very cool!  Jajdugneoxhdmxjfmslxjfnfjdmxjemxjdldnxmxbf

Title: Good service and wonderful atmosphere.
ReviewText: Roxana provided excellent service. The kale salad was delicious and packed with all sorts of goodies I.e.aovados, cashews, cherry tomatoes, with an outstanding and healthy dressing on the side.

Title: Great tuna poke, even better service from Roxana
ReviewText: I had the tuna poke and it was delicious, great service from Roxana. Nice and quiet terrasse. It’s about 30 seconds away from my Airbnb, I will be back for sure!

Title: Awesome Dinner!
ReviewText: The food was great and Roxanna is the best waitress! I had the pollo teryaki which was delicious. The staff was hard working and friendly.

Title: The best place for all meals!
ReviewText: So many great options for vegetarians and healthy eaters. We are staying across the street and found this sweet place. We have had all of our meals here for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Mar is an exceptional server and patient with our English. All the servers had exceptional customer service. My friend is not a vegetarian and she loved all of her meals!

Title: I remember to go over it again
ReviewText: Excellent service from Mar and super delicious dinner 100% recommended the very nice place Clean and tidy  A warm place

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: All very well, I bought a super rich and happy Salmon Sandwich with gluten-free options and excellent seafood 🙌🤗

Title: Typical delicious breakfast
ReviewText: Very nice place. The food is delicious. Our waitress, Mar was very attentive and friendly, described the dishes and the typical breakfast is delicious. I highly recommend.

Title: Excellent place for breakfast
ReviewText: Excellent food and presentation of the dish, the very nice and comfortable place and Mar's attention was very very friendly and attentive

Title: Rum & Tacos
ReviewText: Mar is an amazing server. Her English is perfect and the food was fantastic! My mojito was mixed very well. Such a friendly versatile spot

Title: Amazing attention
ReviewText: I ordered to go and the girl, who served me was very good to me, offered me a very rich coffee and a carrot cake. I've been to a lot of restaurants, and it's amazing how nowhere else in those had I been served in that great way!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: I don't usually make this type of comments but the quality of this service merits it, incredible attention a wonder, I would return to this place only to feel so welcome

Title: Excellent option
ReviewText: It was my first visit to Pots and Bowls. The unbeatable sea attention. Very helpful attentive. Super clean place, same as the bathrooms. The delicious food. I definitely hope to be back soon. 100% recommended

Title: Splendid in every sense
ReviewText: Love it here it is super cozy atmosphere and delicious breakfast and pudding. Mar our waitress was splendid and very Sweet. We will return and 100% recommended!

Title: We highly recommend this!
ReviewText: We were pleasantly surprised by the variety of dishes (breakfast, lunch, dinner, as well as vegetarian/vegan options), the freshness of the ingredients, and the great service.  Mar, our waitress, was very friendly and helpful.  We highly recommend this place.

Title: Aperol in San Jose
ReviewText: The burger was too rich, we went through something to drink and chop and the girl recommended us a burger to share, the aperols quite well thanks to Dayana, she was attentive to us.

Title: Great expererience
ReviewText: Fantastic service from Mara, she is exceptional , always with a great smile and the tuna poke it’s delicious I always visit Pots & bowls after works on Saturday

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: Loved the food and service, I came to dinner with a friend, the excellent chifricoco:) Your location to reach is ideal

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent place and attention from Mar a ten, perfect for any food time, healthy and balanced products

Title: Very nice!!
ReviewText: The food is very good and the service is excellent. We were attended by Mar a very friendly person, I find it a very nice place.

Title: Great for the family
ReviewText: Excelent place for delicious food and having a nice time with family. They have an area where toddlers can play and everything we ordered was great!

Title: Totally pleased
ReviewText: We had a great time;  Dayana's service and attention was spectacular (congratulations), I really recommend the place if you are looking to eat rich.

Title: Top 10 Restaurants in San Jose
ReviewText: Excellent service, very fast and impeccable service, very good atmosphere, very attentive Dayana, fully recommended, definitely would return

Title: Very expensive for a casual eatery and bad ratio between quantity/ quality and price !!! Will not come back
ReviewText: the place is well located near the condo buildings in Rohrmoser and offers a nice setting, however, the prices are extremely high and not justified. I was surprised at the prices of almost all the menu even as a regular restaurant client. We ordered a casado and were disappointed at how simple it was, 9500 cólones !!!! Almost $20.00 for nothing special except for the fact that we added sirloin but in came in less than 10 small pieces!!! Again i am a big foodie and eat out regularly and even internationally, so I would not recommend this place because of the bad ratio between quantity- quality and price.

Title: Coffee break
ReviewText: Service is great, good tasting food and coffee is wonderful. Definitively recommended. Usually come here for breakfast on weekends. Always a good experience.

Title: Nice atmosphere and rich food
ReviewText: Of the best Chilean cakes in San José. Good service and friendly service, the atmosphere is very nice and there is variety on the menu.

Title: Delicious and fast
ReviewText: Excellent service from Mar, the Food arrived super fast and delicious!!!!!!!!!! The pass muuuuuuyy bieeeeeeee:) :) I got a gift that I took away

Title: Cozy, fast and rich.
ReviewText: From the moment we arrived, Mar welcomed us with a smile, explained about the restaurant. The service was excellent and the food came to the table super fast, everything was fresh and tasteful! I'm definitely coming back!

Title: Nice place and delicious food
ReviewText: A nice place to have a good time with delicious food and with the best attention from Mar. Maria biscuit cake with ice cream is spectacular.

Title: Highly recommended
ReviewText: The place is super cute and the food delicious, with quite a variety.  Breakfast is very good. Mar's attention was excellent.

Title: Service and meals are mediocre
ReviewText: Both the service and the quality of the food are mediocre. Attention is intermittent, after you are served you do not know more about them, to which is added that you start attending one, who then withdraws and you are left as abandoned.  Staff without good attitude. The food, I summarize by saying that I got sick with a sautéed sliced tenderloin, lacking flavor and raw despite ordering it 3/4.  I wouldn't even come back.

Title: Nice!
ReviewText: Great burger! !!!!!!!!!!!!!!! You have to come to this place if you want to feel in a great atmosphere and music!  They also have a little shop! Awesome

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Very rich good attention gentle comfortable prices very spacious good parking and good quality the waitress MAr is very attentive and special is nice and the food is served fast warm and with a cheerful attitude

Title: Love both Pots & Bowls
ReviewText: Love this place! Maintains the quality from its original at Playa Grande. Mar is my favorite waitress, her service is very attentive, always welcoming with a warm smile and remembers our names. We are regulars and definitely will keep coming back.

Title: All 5 stars deserved
ReviewText: Great decoration in the place, great service and great food. Also there are a lot of interesting things to buy sourced from local small businesses.

Title: Amazing food and service
ReviewText: This place is next to the air bnb i was staying at. It’s walking distance for Amazing food amazing coffee great service by Mar. 10/10 recommend  Would come again!

Title: Light Lunch
ReviewText: We went here for a light lunch. The coffee was delicious and the fruit was so fresh! I highly recommend this place!  10/10!

Title: Tasty 🤤 with many gluten free options
ReviewText: Extremely tasty food and friendly staff with lots of gluten free options!! We've come back most days, highly recommend. Thank you Mar for your service

Title: Good food & nice ambiance
ReviewText: Nice ambiance and tasty food. Been here for breakfast, lunch and dinner and has never disappointed.  Mar's service was excellent! She was very friendly and provided some good recommendations!

Title: Conveniently excellent!
ReviewText: Mar served us excellently, attentive and helpful. And the food is very very delicious!  Beautiful, central, cozy place! Fully recommended at any time of the day!

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: Delicious food, beautiful place and excellent service from Mar. I would definitely return to try more of the things on the menu.

Title: Great place close to air bnb
ReviewText: Good food and great atmosphere. Happily accommodated my friend that wad on a special diet. Would definitely recommend.

Title: Highly recommended!
ReviewText: Very good restaurant and very good service! Mar took great care of us, very friendly and very warm! If you are looking for a place that serves breakfast, lunch and dinner at all hours with various delicious options, that is the place to come!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent food, drinks and service. The salmon sandwich is a very good choice as is the Chilean cake. Mar's attention is excellent.

Title: The perfect place
ReviewText: The perfect place to work or just have a nice time, the typical breakfast with the extra mushrooms was delicious and Katherin's attention was impeccable.

Title: Highly  recommended!
ReviewText: Excellent food ,drinks and Service!! Mar  take care of Us and my Dog splendidly! The Chifricoco , Pollo Teriyaki and the fish tacos are spectacular!

Title: Great!
ReviewText: Really great experience at pots and bowls. Mar was our server and she was very nice. Food was very fresh and tasty and so was the coffee

Title: Highly recommended food and beautiful place!
ReviewText: We ordered a teriyaki chicken and a caprese chicken and both dishes were super good! Mar attended us and from start to finish she treated us very friendly and helpful. 100% recommended!!!

Title: One of the best places in the savanna
ReviewText: The food is delicious, the place beautiful and the service wonderful. Mar attended to me and was super friendly and attentive. I recommend it 100%

Title: Great restaurant!!
ReviewText: Excellent service, Mar took care of us splendidly. Food was  delicious . Great place to share with family and friends. I totally recommend it!

Title: coffee
ReviewText: Excellent place, super good food. Incredible attention by Mar & Katherine. A place you should visit for breakfast, lunch or a coffee in the afternoon

Title: Best place for an afternoon coffee. ☕️
ReviewText: Impeccable attention, thanks Mar and Katherine! As for the food, it was perfect, the coffee was the best I've ever had. 🫶🏼 Recommended for you to come visit them.

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: Excellent service. Server was Henry. He was super friendly and accommodating. Great atmosphere. Food was phenomenal. Visiting from Houston.

Title: Breakfast
ReviewText: Great place ! I highly recommend it.  The food was very delicious, the service was very good and the place is beautiful. Ideal to go with children, family or friends

Title: Fresh food
ReviewText: Great fresh food, they have a nice patio on a great location! The service was great and a large menu options for breakfast, Lunch and Dinner.

Title: Typical Pura vida
ReviewText: The option that the girl offered us for typical breakfasts was very worth it! Let's not miss trying those green drinks that Dayana offered us. We'll be back before we leave.

Title: a nice place
ReviewText: Very good atmosphere and excellent service from Mar. Delicious food, however, portions could be a little bigger.

Title: Cool spot with good food
ReviewText: Really cool spot with great food and service. Breakfast lunch and dinner. Mar waited on us a few times as we came here often during our stay in Costa Rica.

Title: Good food excellent service
ReviewText: Good food, excellent service. Very attentive sea. We come frequently and have never had any complaints. The terrace is very nice

Title: It's worth it!
ReviewText: Delicious and I recommend ordering the Maria cookie cake!! Mar's attention was very attentive and personalized. The place has very nice national products for sale.

Title: I love Pots :)
ReviewText: Excellent service, the food is always delicious :) and the place is beautiful! Marghel attended to us and was super attentive. I recommend you come

Title: Lunch and coffee
ReviewText: If your looking for a balanced a delicious kind of food, this is the place!!  Everything was really good.  Highly recommended

Title: Overpriced hipster bistro
ReviewText: An overpriced hipster bistro.  Food was acceptable and service was good.  However, portions were deceiving and definetely not value-for-money.   Especially drinks, which are served in small glasses (about 8 oz).  I had a coke which was half ice cubes for $3.50 a glass.  When I complained to the waitress she said her manager said I needed to purchase another one, end of story.   Total for a family of 5, (3 kids menu, 2 entrees, no alcohol drinks, one dessert) was $100.

Title: It's not worth it that much
ReviewText: Very good service, everything was delicious, very nice place and atmosphere, but the portions are super small compared to the price

Title: Good service
ReviewText: Good attention and customer service but the portions are very small and I think the price is very high. The taste is very good and fresh. The pink lady is a must

Title: Great experience!
ReviewText: Excellent food and better service from Marghel.. very good taste, atmosphere and service.. good option near Savannah and surroundings

Title: Great for lunch!
ReviewText: Excellent food! We ordered a cheese hamburguer and fish with veggies, they were both awesome!  Marghel was our waitress and was really kind!

Title: Great Angus burger, attentive service
ReviewText: Great Angus burger, plus attentive service.  Repeat customer and expect to keep coming.  I've also enjoyed breakfast here.  Highly recommend.

Title: Delicious and attentive staff
ReviewText: Mar was super attentive, she was very attentive to us, she advised us very well, the quality of the food was super good and the place is super nice. We will be back

Title: Delicious food
ReviewText: The food here is delicious, especially their steak- cooked to perfection, as well as the smoothies. The service is also excellent and my waitress Marghet was wonderful, very kind and attentive. I definitely recommend

Title: Great place for breakfast, brunch and lunch!
ReviewText: We came back for a second time and it did not disappoint! Great food and service. We enjoyed the Açaí bowl and French toast which were great

Title: Perfect place for healthy food / coffee
ReviewText: One of the best places in San José !  The food is delicious and healthy with high quality products, the service is very welcoming and friendly. The place has a very nice terrasse and the inside has a very cozy, green and relaxing vibe

Had a bit of a train wreck experience here with the family, some items were extremely good, while others were a miss - for the price, it is hard to tolerate the misses, and the excessively slow pace of service seals it. I would probably give it another chance though.

Visiting Costa Rica for a week and this was our first day out for brunch. We were handled so kindly by Anna and Donai. The food was amazing. That honey soaked plantain and rice with peas were spectacular.
Had the Costa Rican breakfast… 10/10! Very filling, very flavourful, the honey plantain was amazing as well.
Absolutely awful. The food quality was poor, lacking flavor. The ceviche, bowls, leche dorada, and juices were all terrible and even made us feel sick for an entire day.
Los bowls riquísimos
No lo recomiendo para nada pésimo servicio
Got a bowl to-go and it was just plain cauliflower rice, a few sad dry pieces of kale, and the tiniest portion of undercooked mushrooms and carrots. Terrible quality and size of food for cost
El lugar mas delicioso de las catalinas!! El sitio es súper bonito, venden cositas lindas tipo para regalos y el personal es super amable.

We arrived at the place intending to have an excellent experience, despite the wait and everything else. We had to wait more than 40 minutes for the menu to be brought to us, so we went to get it. We waited a long time for the food and coffee but what surprised us most was that it wasn't very crowded.
Nice place, decent food, a bit pricey for what you get. The service was poor—we waited over an hour just to place our order, and then even longer for the food. I wouldn't recommend this place at all.

Seems like there was a bunch of totally overwhelmed college kids running kitchen and service… we felt sorry for them! Every table occupied and all waiting for at least 90 minutes for food. Finally received a tiny wooden plate with an overcooked burger that was absolutely overpriced. This setup only works because tourists don’t know any better and won’t return a second time.
Slow service. 1 hour to get food.
The food was delicious. A piña colada was perfect.The atmospheres were great.  Most of all, Anna made our dine-in experience more pleasant.
Waited over 30 minutes for 1 tiny smoothie and the place wasn’t that busy at all. Would recommend going somewhere else
Four stars as the food is basic but it is very good and well executed.  Very friendly service and nice spot.  Best breakfast / lunch spot around probably.

Food is tasty but expensive because of location. It took 1 hour to get our food with our kids food served last. We asked for an update on the food a couple times but seems like the order was forgotten or lost. There are a few other restaurants nearby so perhaps try someplace else first. Close to a splash pad for the kids!

We ordered one eggs Benedict at the bar and one with the waiter, after 1,5 waiting we just got 1 and they never placed order for the second. I guess don't order with the bar. At least they are honest with 40-60 minutes wait time upfront.
Awesome Food!! Great Drinks!!

Porciones super pequeñas, un casado en 10 mil porque cobran las proteina aparte y dan una porción mínima. La comida no es nada especial, y el servicio deja que desear, pedimos cubiertos para llevar y nos respondieron de mala gana
Food is good but $10 for a tiny smoothie is just wrong.

Amazing experience amazing service amazing people except for probably just one lady that was serving us during the breakfast timings. She seemed a bit clueless, but every everyone else was absolutely fabulous. The food was delicious so much variety.

The absolute best food in the area hands down. Whether it’s breakfast, lunch or dinner. This is the go to spot. La mejor comida de la zona, sin duda. Ya sea para desayunar, comer o cenar, este es el lugar ideal.

Update: Manuel the manager made things better. Nice manager. Ask for him. Most unfriendly barista - at walk up bar. Stayed scrolling on his phone while i just waited. A co worker had to prompt him to greet me. This guy leads with frowning and a combative nature when attempting to order a drink. Stayed here at Las Catalinas for a week Nov 27th - Dec 5th. Among other food options - i loved the taste of their Chai tea and breakfast bowl but decided to stop eating at this location because of the staff. Just grumpy individuals. I wished I could have seen a name tag of Mr. Main scrooge himself. I can say it was the guy powering up the drinks at the coffee area most mornings on Nov 30th and Dec 1st.
Delicious food and juices. Great service. Reasonable prices. Totally recommend! Take the casado if you want something local.
Todos os restaurantes do complexo são bons porém com preços elevados

Had breakfast here on our first full day in Las Catalinas and enjoyed the meal. Started with a cappuccino and strawberry matcha - both which were solid. Went with the potato hash and sweet and spicy chicken and waffles for our mains. The potato hash was good, a little pricey for what it was and could have used some hot sauce but good none-the-less. The highlight of the meal was the chicken from the chicken and waffles - some of the best chicken we've ever had. Only compliant here is the chicken to waffle ratio is way off - ideally need more chicken or less waffle. Not a ton of breakfast options in Las Catalinas but this one was definitely our favorite, worth the few extra bucks compared to lack-luster Nature's Table.

Great little restaurant in Las Catalinas, delicious juices and food. I had the Casado with Hangar Steak, steak was cooked perfectly. Wife had the Teriyaki bowl and it was delicious, good chicken and lots of fresh broccoli.

Servicio super malo ambiente un zaguate adentró nada que ver los perros tienen su area y siempre es fuera. Un lugar muy estrecho para que el perro ande mesa por mesa. Comida muy ricas las hamburguesas y el lomito. Los bowl nos trajeron diferentes presentaciones cosa que no gusta porque no vienen con las mismas porciones. En el mio las algas ni las vi. El chifricoco el coco también brillo por su ausencia no tenia ni el olor jajaja. Se pide salsa de soya que usualmente en un sushi lo traen pues aquí es un extra. Lo peor de este lugar es el servicio ...

Increíble atención de nuestro mesero gama muy buena energía y muy atento me tome un chocolate natural caliente y se siente lo puro que es , y que decir de la comida, comimos la hamburguesa deluxe y la quesoburguesa prime y me fascinó la combinación que lleva, en general muy bueno todo!
Amazing coffee and golden milk! Lovely atmosphere.
Beautiful, peaceful place to eat. Smoothies to die for and my daughter ate the most delicious coconut flour pancakes.
The place is nice. The cortados were mediocre. The brownie was good, the $6+ vanilla ice scream scoop was OK at best. The hot chocolate was good!
Jonathan was amazing, and so was my smoothie bowl! Highly recommend!
If you want the best eggs Benedic of Latin América this is the place. Trust me it's just different. Great work @PotsandBowls.

Nos atendió Roy y desde el primer momento fue buena la experiencia, muy atento e insistente con las alergias, cosa que me parece excelente porque pocas veces hacen preguntas así por seguridad o al menos a mí me parece importante. Pedimos para desayunos huevos benedictinos y tostadas francesas, un batido de limonada de frambuesa y dos cafés. Todo estaba delicioso y muy fresquito, las tostadas son de las mejores que he probado y la salsa que las acompaña es 10/10. Tiene dos ambientes, en interior con aire y exterior en la playa y ambos están bellos y limpios.

To piggyback off another review on here, some of the items on the menu do seem small portion-wise compared to the price being charged. It was delicious food, though, but my dish cost a little more than my husband’s and he got what looked like 2.5x more food on his plate. I ordered the scramble on a tortilla (the one with the mushrooms and tomatoes), so it wasn’t like I was paying more because it had meat in it. We ate here twice during our stay in Las Catalinas. Both times, they were out of the chicken and waffles that my husband wanted to try. Disappointing but understandable. Staff is very friendly, though!
Son atentos pero la comida es mediocre y se demora demasiado.  Estuvimos 85 minutos esperando que nos trajeran los platos fuertes. Not worth the price

Went here in 2023 for our honeymoon…..we got the bacon cheeseburger, fries, and lil side of ketchup. What was suppose to be a simple meal turned into my favorite restaurant in Las Catalina’s. THE FOOD WAS PHENOMENAL!! My wife thought I went overboard getting 3 extra cheese burgers to go back to the room with us but then I found her snacking on them that night. 1 year later we went back for our 1 year anniversary and I brought her family and we smashed their bacon cheeseburgers yet again 😂. Gabriel or Gabriella was our waitress both times and she’s absolutely amazing. Both times she had braces on so maybe for our 2nd or 3rd anniversary they’ll be off finally lol. Is the food pricey? Not really. Las Catalina’s is a luxury town and Pots & Bowls is actually affordable. I know it sounds dumb, but even the ketchup is better than back here in the USA lol. Hands down the best restaurant in Las Catalina’s for a sit down casual meal. We would love to purchase a home their in the future, so they better not ever change the food at Pots&Bowls 😆.
Great spot for breakfast. Lots of healthy options. Fantastic cafe’.  Local gato likes to hang out occasionally.

This was my go to breakfast spot during my stay in Las Catalina’s. Dina & Roy are the best! They took care of us every morning with smoothies, coffee, and of course a Costaricana breakfast. They’re friendly, inviting, and very helpful when it came to my Spanish skills. Dina really enjoys her job and it shows. I began looking forward to seeing her at breakfast every morning. I’d recommend this place to anyone who enjoys good company and good food!

This was the best place we ate at IMO at this resort area. I had the steak and kids chicken (sorry don’t remember exact the name) and both here great. I would suggest seasoning the steak better. I took it to go and had to get salt from my hotel. Went back the night after to try other dishes and they were good, but the steak was better. Did not care for the falafel appetizer.
El desayuno típico está muy bien en tamaño de porciones y en calidad. El servicio también muy bien. Es un sitio muy agradable

Precios por persona entre ₡10,000 y ₡12,000 ($20) , cuenta con menú de niños y zona de niños. Creo que el menú de bowls debería ser más amplio ya que solo tienen poke bowl y teriyaki bowl. Una opción económica en la zona.
Una opción dentro de Las Catalinas para los amantes de los Bowls, de igual manera venden otras cosas. El servicio muy bueno y rápido. Los bowls estaban ricos y frescos, buena cantidad.

De entrada pedimos un ceviche con pesca del día, y si tienen la oportunidad de probarlo, no se lo pierdan. De plato fuerte, optamos por los tacos de carne mechada y una hamburguesa con queso. Todo estuvo de primera calidad y con un gran sabor, lo disfrutamos y quedamos más que satisfechos. Hay un par de cosas a tener en cuenta. El restaurante está en una zona bastante exclusiva, lo que explica los precios. En cuanto a la comida, todo nos encantó, aunque me sorprendió que las papas fueran congeladas, considerando que el resto del menú tenía un estilo muy artesanal. Para beber, pedimos una limonada con hierbabuena y un smoothie de mango, ambos súper frescos. El servicio fue impecable: todo limpio, ordenado y rápido. El personal estuvo siempre atento a lo que necesitábamos y rellenaban el agua en cuanto notaban que se estaba acabando. Atención 100/10.
Do not order the açaí bowl. I don’t know what they put in there, but it tasted like artificial candy sweetener. Very weird flavor unlike anything I’ve ever tasted.
Food was good. This was one of the more reasonably priced restaurants at Las Catalinas which is not saying much. They sat us as they were closing up, and I'm grateful for that.

Pots & Bowls is a charming spot with a delicious and healthy menu. We visited for breakfast and later returned for an afternoon snack. We had good service and a delightful conversation with Dina, who taught us a few Spanish words and shared some interesting insights about Las Catalinas. My boyfriend is now repeating Con mucho gusto non stop ;-)

This restaurant takes slow service into a whole new time zone.   Our breakfast order was french toast with bacon, and potato hash with a poached egg.   After 1 hour no food had arrived.   The tables around us fared on better, and everyone was looking around wondering what was going on.   First out was a portion of the french toast order, but not the hash potato order.  At about the one hour and 15 minute mark the rest of the first order came out and the hash potatoes and egg.   Potatoes were below average.   A 750ml bottle of water cost $6 but it did have slogans on it such as "this bottle contains the Voice of Nature."
I had the chicken and waffles. They were great! The coconut cream was good on them. It took alot of time to get our order but we were hanging out with friends talking so time went by fast.

Esperamos 50 min. Por 3 desayunos, y no habia casi gente. Cuando llegaron 2 tipicos y 1 waffle estaban frios. 😢El lugar adentro estaba lleno de moscas, me parecio raro teniendo aire acondicionado. Primera y ultima vez.

He ido dos veces. La primera vez que fui me gustó mucho la comida y la atención, me pedí un bowl de pollo teriyaki y estaba delicioso. Sin embargo, esta segunda vez que fui, me decepcionó demasiado, volví a pedir el mismo plato y le bajaron muchísimo la calidad, la primera vez que lo había pedido el pollo venia bien sazonado y salteado en la salsa teriyaki, traía maní, queso, zanahoria rallada, brócoli, entre otros ingredientes y también me habían dado salsa teriyaki por aparte para ponerle al bowl. Pero esta segunda vez el pollo estaba hervido y no tenía sabor a salsa teriyaki, casi no tenía maní, traía una cantidad exagerada de chile dulce y cebolla para rellenar el plato y no sirvieron salsa teriyaki por aparte. Además, cuando estaba comiendo, encontré un pelo en el pollo y cuando le indiqué al mesero lo sucedido, simplemente retiró el plato y tiempo después me trajo uno nuevo, pero no dijo absolutamente nada. Sencillamente muy mala la experiencia. Que lástima que bajaran tanto la calidad.
We ate here multiple times during our stay in Las Catalina’s. The food and smoothies were amazing. The staff and Dina always took care of us and made an authentic Costa Rican experience.
Awesome food great service, need outside fans and should coordinate playlist with nextdoor rest

Comida buena y buena atención , pero NO SON PRECIOS ACCESIBLES como dicen por ahí , un Smoothie de 12 oz en 5.000 colones no es accesible , un casado con proteína promedio de 11 colones( sin contar bebida )  . Son buenos pero tiene precios más altos que en todo Europa y Estados Unidos
If you are hungry don’t go here , the food not bad but the portions are ridiculously small and the price way to expensive I won’t recommend it ..
Good atmosphere, food, and service 👌

I love this place!  We've been coming here since they were a food truck on the edge of Las Catalinas.  They have great food - try the Chifricoco - smoothies, and drinks.  The staff are super nice and, of course, you can't beat the location.

Un lugar hermoso con una atención espectacular. Donay y el equipo fueron maravillosos, incluso me sorprendieron cantándome por mi cumpleaños. El servicio fue impecable, y las recomendaciones que nos dieron no pudieron haber sido mejores. Una experiencia inolvidable.

We really enjoyed our experience at Pots & Bowls. It's a bit pricey, yes, but that's the vibe in Las Catalinas. Service was friendly and we were happy to have enjoy the air conditioning indoors. Both the French toast (with strawberry-lime compote, yum!) and the veggie burger were amazing; they had a number of appealing vegetarian options. Would definitely return.
Great burger, was very large and fresh with fries. Fresh bacon and avacado on it as well. My husband loves me their fresh juice…Pricey but it’s like that everywhere in town. Great spot for lunch

Outstanding food. Generous portions. Impeccable service. Couldn't ask for a better dinner. The spicy passionfruit margarita is a real winner too! Thank you to our warm and friendly server Amanda for making our visit super special!
Really avoid the avocado toast bread was so bad, with flavorless avocado, no love in this food.
The Catalinas is by itself a very beautiful and interesting beach community concept. Pots & Bowls breakfast was a great start for a beach day in this great beach community
La comida estaba bien, tardaron mucho en servir y cuando unos habíamos terminado, otros esperaban su plato. Pero si es un lugar para ir. Esta bien.
Great place. I’ve ate at Las Catalinas and the location at Playa Grande. Both highly recommended

Great ambience, good selection of healthy breakfast and lunch options. The price to portion ratio is way off for some items. I ordered the chia pudding and it felt like a side dish. Left me hungry. The tico breakfast was fine. Nothing special. The surprising part is that their coffee kinda sucks and I find that surprising for a restaurant/coffee shop in Costa Rica. The service was slow. I don’t think I would be returning back.

We have only done breakfast so far and this morning will be our 3rd time. Loved the breakfast burrito, make sure to add bacon. Cappuccino was good, and big! On the desert side they add chocolate to everything. Peanut butter brownie should not have chocolate, the banana nut muffin should not have chocolate.
Desayuno almuerzo y cena todo el día. Pr Porsupuesto cafecito
Great
Super recomendadito
Delicious coffee and Tico breakfast. Great service. Sat indoors in the air conditioned dining room. Lovely!

Food and drinks were delicious. Service was average but good. I didn’t like the amount of flies that were in the dining room. I understand that is a beach front hotel and some doors and windows may be open but they should have some sort of way of preventing the flies. Maybe little fly fans for tables so I don’t have to be shooing away flyers while I eat?
Imposible comer en el area de afuera, tantas moscas que ni pude terminar mi comida. La verdad no sé si es exclusivo del lugar o si sucede en todos los restaurantes. La comida tampoco estaba buena.
Buena comida.  Precios accesibles
Desastre de restaurante ! Nunca me llegó mi único pedido luego de 45 minutos de espera para un simple bowl . No pierdan su tiempo no vayan

My boyfriend and I had a great New years eve dinner here. Despite the fact there were no more spots available for the formal dinner, they make space for us in the bar and order to La carte the normal menu. I had the caught of the day (grilled fish with veggies) it was fantastic!
Terrible service, average food and prepare to dine surrounded by flies. Don’t het excited with the menu, since they don’t have half of what’s in it. Wouldn’t recommend.
Excellent food, well presented and good service

We had a lovely and fresh breakfast here at pots and bowls! The staff super friendly and so many wonderful options to choose from. We sat inside as it was a bit hot outside but my husband and I both had the poached eggs over bacon/potatoes with hollandiase.     It was as you can imagine fabulous and hit the spot for a special over the top breakfast. It was a bit $ but all the restaurants are in las Catalina’s to be honest. We had a wonderful coffee and it was huge we just shared 1 and it was just right! We will be back maybe tomorrow! 🤣

Un lugar asombroso para comer, la atencion al cliente espectacular, precios accesibles para el lugar, la comida deliciosa, dan aguita al inicio y todo, el desayuno delicioso y el pollo teriyaki asombrosamente rico, el smoothie Sunrise delicioso, y el café con leche delicioso, aparte que antes de tomar tu orden te preguntan sobre tus alergias, muy atentos con todos los detalles y el ambiente maravilloso!!!
Good food healthy and delicious. A little pricey

Me encantó este lugar, la comida estuvo muy buena. Algo que me gustó mucho fue el trato del personal. Tambien hay que recalcar debido al lugar es que no me parecieron caros los precios de la comida fue bastante accesible.
Bonito lugar, comida y servicio excelente,  falta un poco de ambiente, música en vivo tal vez ayudaría. El camino para llegar no está en las mejores condiciones, aún en camioneta
My wife is diabetic and ordered the Keto Burger which was served on a whole avacado. It was delicious and a good portion. I ordered the Shakshuka which was good. Not too spicy but a little heat.
No need to look further!!!!

Los precios son altos para la calidad y cantidad de comida, la cual es buena, pero es mejor en la sucursal cercana a Playa Grande.  El pinto burrito contenía muy poco pinto. La atención muy buena, y el ambiente muy bonito, con la playa muy cerca.
Todos los Smoothies están buenos.
Buena comida con un trato muy agradable en un entorno privilegiado. Precios muy altos.

Give it a try! Service was good. Location was good (allows kids to play in the splash pad). We didn't like the Gallo pinto x2. I think they fried the cheese and made the eggs after cooking fish?... so the cheese and eggs were fishy. Update 2023: After living here some time, sometimes Costa Rican/Nicaraguan cheese is fishy. I don't know if it's the rennet or what. Turrialba typically isn't, but it might depend on the brand. I strongly dislike fishy cheese. It may not bother everyone. The kiddos pancakes were fine and their smoothie was good. Maybe it was just an off day, or we should have ordered a different items. We thought it would be good because the Playa Grande location is very popular. This is a popular local restaurant and definitely worth a try.

Nice place, but they will charge you fir anything,  even if you ask them replace one ingredient with another, they do for amount of money, and even if they make mistakes, fir example they brought something you didn't order, they still are going to charge fir little stupid things.  All about  money, not customer, very disappointing
Amazing place!!! Loved the acai Bowles, smoothies, coconut 🥞!!! Definitely recommend.
Great pressed juices and smoothies. Good food teriyaki bowl was amazing. We definitely will eat here again.
Delicious food, good vegan options and friendly staff. The setting is very nice too. Highly recommend!

Beautiful location, nice ocean view, great outdoor seating. Excellent service, and the food was good but not amazing. I really liked my Shakshookah, but the rest of my family were not very impressed with the burrito and Pinto breakfast bowl, although they were recommended by our waiter and he said that those are many people’s favorites. I definitely recommend this restaurant, it’s a good choice to experience Las Catalinas
Nice spot, but at breakfast the egg dish (shaskshouka) was terrible with too much pepper.  The worst thing was that there was not even the slightest intention to remedy the error
Comida exquisita, excelente atención, buenas porciones! Precios razonables para estar en Las Catalinas y con vista al mar. Muy recomendado, 10/10
Exelente bello sin Palabras

I was able to see the ocean while eating a sweet bowl made of granola, peanut butter and chocolate icecream. It was a truely refreshing and deligtful experience. I totally recommend eating outside on a sunny day under an umbrella table ⛱️. It really gives the beach town vibes 🌴
Great poke bowl!
Flan de coco bien bueno

Our favorite breakfast spot while we stayed in Las Catalinas! Healthy options full of flavor. We got the Green Juice, Chia Bowl and Casado plate, all were delicious. Good iced coffee drinks as well as 2 for 1 mimosas. Friendly service every time!

The first time we ate here it was great and AIR CONDITIONED.   Second time was miserable because the windows were all open and basically everyone is dripping with sweat and there was NO AIR CONDITION which made it disgusting and uncomfortable and we could wait to leave and of course it takes forever to get the bill.
Lugar charmoso, com comida muito saborosa e atendimento excelente. Atendentes simpáticos e ambiente agradável. A comida não é em grandes quantidades, porém muito saborosa. Preço justo.
Muy buen servicio y variedad.
Muy buena comida
Amazing food, amazing service, amazing energy! Love it!
Delicious smoothie bowl and a beautiful location! I had the tropical with Spirulina.
Excelente restaurante. Precios accesibles y una impecable atención al cliente. Deben de pasar a tomarse un café en este lugar si vienen a las Catalinas. Es una parada obligatoria.

No tengo palabras para expresar lo bien que nos atendieron en este lugar. Desde el principio la señorita Vanesa ofreciendo una silla más cómoda para mi abuelo de 93 años; la comida espectacular, súper saludable y todo recién hecho. Pero vuelvo y repito, la atención de Vanesa nos hace querer volver y probar todo el menú. Totalmente recomendado.
Buena atención  buen trato  Excelente   comida y variedad de bebidas precios  razonables.

Its about the food and great outside seating--super creative menu, and very veggie friendly--check out the menu---chef is super inventive--all unique. Ate there 5 time for breakfast, lunch and dinner in a week.
Favorite restaurant in Las Catalinas.  Health conscious things to eat.
Food is sublime! All locally sourced and lots of vegetarian options. Sat outside on the plaza... it was like being in Italy.
Comida buena , servicio muy malo.
Great dinner, and service. Especially from Jonathan the sommelier.
Comida deliciosa en un ambiente tranquilo.  Delicious food, cool place.
Demasiado delicioso. 100% recomendado.
Awesome place, super nice staff, food is incredible. We had gazpacho and Patras bravas and tuna poke, every dish blew our minds!
Excelente
Wish we stumbled upon Pots & Bowls earlier in our stay! Food was yummy, staff was friendly, and the seating area was nicely set up!
Muy rica la comida
Perfect!
This is a family favorite! Wonderful food and great service!
Great food! We loved the Tropical bowl, Poke Bowl and Fish tacos! Very friendly service!

What a nice spot.  The staff was extremely helpful, attentive and friendly.  The atmosphere is great. The food is even better, all healthy and fresh.  The prices were reasonable and most importantly they have options for glutten free,  keto and vegan food.  I would recommend for anyone.  I'm definetly coming back here,  it's delicious.

Title: Never come
ReviewText: The worst. I don't recommend it.  The staff super cold. The food lasts a long time. Very little food for the price  Plus I had to take off my flies while I ate there were too many

Title: Super experience
ReviewText: A lovely experience in this wonderful town, the food was delicious, we ordered in tuna poke and chicken teriyaki, the quality of food was excellent, we appreciate Hailyn's service and attention, she was the one who made us feel at home being so far away from her, as Costa Rican had always experienced some favoritism regarding the treatment towards us, but this time if we were made to feel special, that girl is a 10/10. Thank you very much pure life!

Title: Incredible Service from Hailyn & Must-Try Shrimp Tacos
ReviewText: Highly recommend, and if you can, ask for Hailyn! My fiancé and I had such a wonderful experience, and so much of that was thanks to our waitress, Hailyn. She was kind, friendly, and so knowledgeable about the menu. Her recommendations were spot on (do not skip the shrimp tacos!), and she made us feel so welcomed and cared for. Beyond the food (which was delicious) Hailyn was simply the loveliest human, and truly embodies Pura Vida. Thank you, Hailyn, for making our visit so special.

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Everything was great! Our server, Hailyn, was amazing! Costa Rican breakfast is excellent. Would highly recommend!!

Title: Great except for cell tower…
ReviewText: The food here is great! Our server was Hailyn and she was also wonderful and very helpful. She was very friendly and even helped us practice our Spanish! The only downside is that Las Catalinas put up a massive 5g tower very close by. Bummer… But if you want clean and good food this is your place.

Title: A wonderful casual dining experience
ReviewText: Fresh food, great presentation, casual outdoor dining and if you’re lucky you’ll get Anna as your waitress. So helpful and her smile lights up a room.

Title: All delicious
ReviewText: Amazing experience. Ana an excellent hostess.  Please try the lemon brownie with vegan ice cream: SPECTACULAR

Title: Great lunch spot on the beach in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: Great spot for lunch in Las Catalinas. We enjoyed the Tuna Poke, very fresh and nice portion. They are little slow on food prep and service but the wait is worth it.

Title: Awesome
ReviewText: Food was amazing and the service was amazing as well. Oxi was our waitress! Highly recommend going here for breakfast or brunch

Title: Outstanding service and quality food
ReviewText: Donnay was the ultimate host at both Pots and Bowls and Pascual. My husband and I dined at both and could not have had a better experience. From the service to the food it was exceptional. If you are looking. For a go to in Las Catalinas these two 2️⃣ places are a must try. We will definitely return.

Title: Excellent place to spend the afternoon
ReviewText: Excellent and very nice place, next to the square that makes it ideal to have a good time while you drink something.  Service is very good and food is great, we ordered the burger that is excellent and the tacos that were amazing.

Title: Pots & Bows
ReviewText: Everything from the coffee, to the smoothies, to the consistent Casado & chifricoco orders we’d get. We loved everything we ever got here. Thank you Donnay for the incredible hospitality and everything more!

Title: Great Service, food and prices
ReviewText: Delicious Food. Great prices and very good ambience. In the Center of Las Catalinas, convenient and with a healthy menu

Title: A real gem
ReviewText: Pots and Bowls is an absolute gem!  A special shout-out to Maria, whose kindness and attentiveness made our visit unforgettable. She went above and beyond to make sure we felt welcome and well taken care of. Her friendly smile elevated the whole experience.

Title: Maria Espinoza a class of her own.
ReviewText: Pots & Bowls has a key to success: Maria Espinoza. Her exceptional service and friendliness captured the hearts of all of our friends. The coffee was superb and so was the banana bread.

Title: Best restaurant for all meals
ReviewText: We are here 4 times in just 4 days!! The food was incredible. Everyone who worked there makes you feel like family. This is a must try!

Title: Wonderful, fresh vegetarian food
ReviewText: We were here every day during our stay at Las Catalinas. The food was amazing and fresh, mainly for breakfast and a couple of times for lunch. Service is amazing, the team is so friendly and welcoming. We are vegetarian and there was such good variety for us. Food was fresh, looked forward to going there every time.

Title: Only go If you want to wait 1 hour 40 mins !!
ReviewText: This place is really nice however wow, we had to wait 1 hour 40 mins for our breakfast. We chased twice. The food when it eventually arrived was great. They knocked 10% off the bill but I wouldn’t go back as it was painfully slow and food didn’t arrive at the same time so yeah pretty rubbish.

Title: Consistently fantastic.
ReviewText: This place is a hidden gym in plain sight at lost Catalinas. The food is always outstanding.  Everything is fresh, delicious, and beautifully prepared. Hard to be the setting. The service is excellent.

Title: Kept coming back…
ReviewText: The food and staff are amazing. We came one day for smoothies as an afternoon snack. We came back the next morning for breakfast and it was so good. Açaí bowls, French toast, eggs, fresh fruit, it was all great. Ended up coming back on our last day for one more breakfast.

Title: Delicious, authentic, personable
ReviewText: Have eaten her multiple meals and couldn't be happier. The staff are genuinely interested in you having a great experience. The food is authentic and fantastic. We asked how a particular dish was made, and our server brought out the chef- who I'll bet has been cooking these meals for decades and has perfected them! Both outdoor and indoor seating (if the heat is a little too much).

Title: Great place
ReviewText: All excellent, good service and the food is very delicious. Special for lunch and mid-afternoon coffee! The place is really very nice

Title: Unpleasant food and drinks for what we were given and especially very expensive
ReviewText: Terrible ordeal  The place was full of flies, neat, trash near our table, ugly food, not what we expected and dreadful drinks. I do NOT recommend them.

Title: Awful place to eat.  The incredible number of flies inside and the quality of food do not make of this place a good one.
ReviewText: Poke bowls made with old rice and hundreds of flies moving around us was just awful.  We ordered 3 tuna poke bowls, a teriyaki chicken, 4 lemonades and a beer and some chips as appetizer.  We paid US $160.

Title: Great service and food
ReviewText: Everything was wonderful. Our server, Dina was excellent. Food is very good. Casual dining and great atmosphere, highly recommend.

Title: Yummy
ReviewText: Delicious kale salad with chicken, açaí and spirulina bowl. Protein shakes. Great service and super friendly. One of our favorite places. Dina, Juan and the rest of the team were so kind and made us feel at home all week.

Title: Beautiful scenery, wonderful food, friendly staff
ReviewText: Such a beautiful spot! We were here visiting by the beach and stopped for a typical Costa Rican breakfast and smoothie bowl! Dina was a wonderful server and food was amazing!

Title: Tasty food and welcoming staff !
ReviewText: The costa rican breakfast was amazing. You should try the spicy sauce which is homemade and excellent. Dina welcome us and was very sympathetic !

Title: Our favorite place
ReviewText: This is me, my friends, and my family’s favorite place in las Catalina’s. They have the BEST burgers and teriyaki chicken. Dina is the sweetest lady who works at pits and bowls and Pascual. Every staff member is above and beyond and the food is amazing. Do not skip out

Title: Highly recommend
ReviewText: Excellent food! Very fresh and the coffee is amazing. We are here several times for breakfast and lunch and loved every dish!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: The service was amazing.  The food was fresh and delicious without breaking the bank….not like other restaurants in this area.

Title: Excellent service
ReviewText: It is a super pleasant place and the splendid attention by the saloneros super recommended for all occasions. The best place.

Title: Excellent option in the gluten friendly area
ReviewText: Excellent gluten friendly option, in the area! Delicious food!  They ask you if you have allergies and restrictions and adjust your menu. Very rich! It was a pleasant experience and we managed to find a place where they took care of all our needs. We are a group of coeliacs, allergic and intolerant to gluten and other dietary restrictions . It was the only place in the area, extremely grateful! Look for Amanda and Donnay!

Title: Perfect casual lunch spot
ReviewText: Really enjoyed our lunch here, so much we went 2x during our stay! Tasty, healthy, friendly staff, perfect casual lunch spot! (And has indoors with ac for really hot days)

Title: Vacances, Costa Rica
ReviewText: Great experience where we feasted with an exceptional waitress, Dina who was in great care with us, whether for breakfast lunch or dinner. Do not hesitate you will not be disappointed.. The joie de vivre and the desire to please Dina, finished embellishing your holidays.

Title: Awesome Restaurant great service!
ReviewText: The food and atmosphere are outstanding! Best cup of coffee I’ve had in all Costa Rica, and the traditional Costa Rican breakfast was delicious. Dina was our server and she made the experience that much better.

Title: Dina is Fabulous
ReviewText: What a fabulous lunch! Dina was our server & she was just wonderful. Very welcoming & had us smiling from the start. Not to mention the food was delicious. Would come again and again!

Title: Best restaurant in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: Pots and Bowls is hands down the best restaurant in Las Catalinas. The food is consistently excellent and the views from the tables are exceptional (about 10 steps to the beach if you’ve got kids running back and forth). We were in Las Catalinas for a week and our family of four ate there numerous times for every meal (in person and to go) Every meal was excellent, smoothies and coffee were delicious, and best of all, every member of their staff was amazing. Truly—everyone in Las Catalina’s was lovely, but the people at Pots and Bowls are exceptional. Our son has a serious food allergy and every member of the staff took the time to understand what he needed to avoid, and we were able to relax knowing he was safe to enjoy his meal. They were also very patient with my slow attempts at Spanish (most everyone spoke excellent English as well), and even helped me learn some new words. Our family had a blast every time and never felt rushed. Huge thanks to Dena, Roy, Donnay, and the rest of the staff. If you’re traveling to Las Catalinas this is the spot to go back to again and again! ❤️

Title: If I could eat there every day for the rest of my life, I would!
ReviewText: We ate there for both breakfast and lunch and the food was amazing.  Healthy and flavorful, with lots of options.  Amazing lattes and juices.  And home-made habanero hot sauce!  Everyone there works so hard and Dina and her great smile is a fabulous way to start the day!

Title: Wonderful with tons of healthy options
ReviewText: We love to eat here! Extremely healthy Whole Foods!! Beautiful views! Deena was so kind and friendly!!  We have eaten here for breakfast lunch and dinner… all delicious!!

Title: Beautiful sunset and great for kids
ReviewText: Absolutely delicious food and excellent service. The atmosphere was very relaxed and our kids played in the square fountain the entire time. Great place for families!

Title: Great experience
ReviewText: Dina was a great server.  Very personable.  The food is healthy and beautifully prepared.  Would go there Everytime I visit Las Catalinas.

Title: Love my acai bowls
ReviewText: Amazing food, fresh, great presentation and the staff is very welcoming. I highly recommend the Acai bowls and the salads are great aswell.

Title: Great experience!
ReviewText: This place was amazing! So tasty, and great service. Make sure you get the smoothies! Dina was lovely and so nice. We came with kids and they were very accommodating. We will definitely be returning!

Title: LOVED IT!
ReviewText: We had breakfast AND lunch here, while spending the day @ Playa Danta. The food was great - we had the Costa Rican breakfast, smoothies, acai bowl, the kale salad @ tuna on crispy rice. Everything tasted fresh - Dina's warm energy and expertise was also amazing!!!! Highly recommend.

Title: Loved it
ReviewText: Great spot for breakfast and lunch. Excellent gallo pinto and tuna. Good location with outdoor seating and good service.

Title: Yummy food!
ReviewText: We did breakfast and lunch here everyday as our hotel breakfast was just okay. I ordered the Costa Rican breakfast every day and the hubby had the breakfast burrito with chicken. (Ask for the special sauce. It hits!) The breakfast always got us ready for a day at the beach. For lunch, their kale salad was amazing! The honey vinaigrette tied everything together. I can’t forget their mango passion smoothie…oh so good! What made us come back to this lovely establishment was Dina, the regular server. She always had a smile on her face despite how busy it got. She remembered our names and we always felt welcomed when she greeted us. Check this place out. You won’t be disappointed!

Title: The worst service of my life
ReviewText: LOUSY SERVICE  An hour waiting for food they charged badly, the chicken was cold. They changed the food again and it was still bad they cooled everything.

Title: Best Kale Salad Anywhere!
ReviewText: We come and visit Las Catalinas about once a year. Every time I come the first place I eat is Pots and bowls. The food is amazing and the staff is always friendly. Nina was our waitress this time and was so kind and “Pura Vida” If you like kale, try the kale salad with quinoa. It’s the best kale salad I’ve ever had!

Title: Ask for Dina!
ReviewText: Dina was so nice and welcoming! She asked for our names and made us feel comfortable. Great food overall. Highly recommend.

Title: Had a great experience
ReviewText: Great environment and service. Food was really authentic costarican. Loved also the flexibility to modify food items. Music 👍

Title: Fabulous Food
ReviewText: Pots and Bowls was my favorite restaurant at Las Catalinas. I ate here for lunch and breakfast. I couldn’t believe how fresh and healthy all the options were. Then I tasted my food and was blown away by how delicious it was. The price and service were outstanding as well.

Title: Amazing breakfast and service!
ReviewText: Amazing breakfast! Donnay did a great job explaining everything. Will definitely be back! The food was prepared with care and so tasty. Sorry, no pics because it was to good to put the fork down.

Title: Amazing food in las Catalinas!
ReviewText: We’ve come here multiple times on our trip. They have amazing coffee, smoothies, breakfast and lunch. Super friendly staff and just a great atmosphere we love it!!

Title: A Pots and Bowls Delight!
ReviewText: Fabulous food and unbelievable service!! We met the chef and the manager who both recommended the local catch of the day- a recommendation for the books as the food was divine! Perfectly sauted  seafood, delicate tortillas and salsa with just the right “bite”. The wine and beer pairings were spot on! Don’t miss this little gem!

Title: Great for Dinner
ReviewText: Great food excellent service from Gamaliel, great place good prices, lot of variety, with A/C, good location, definitely recommend

Title: Delicious breakfast with sea view
ReviewText: We came to breakfast... And we did better than we could have wished...  We ordered a chicken with spectacular waffle! And some Benedictine eggs with sourdough bread, delicious!!!  The only bad thing is not being able to eat anymore...!

Title: Excellent atmosphere. Very friendly service. Delicious food.
ReviewText: We had some new dishes for breakfast: toast with rib meat and Benedictine eggs, and chicken with waffles... We don't regret anything!

Title: Amazing experience of healthy seafront food
ReviewText: Visiting pots & bowls is always a good decision. The location is spectacular right in front of the beach, allowing you to enjoy a wonderful view of the sea while eating. The cool breeze and the sound of the waves create a relaxed and perfect atmosphere to disconnect. The food is simply delicious and fresh. The menu is full of healthy options, from salads to nutritious bowls and natural juices, all prepared with high-quality local ingredients. I recommend detox juices, refreshing and full of energy. The service was impeccable, the staff is very friendly and attentive, always with a smile and willing to make recommendations according to tastes. In addition, it is noted that the restaurant has a strong commitment to sustainability, as they use local products and offer options for people with different food restrictions. If you are looking for a place to eat rich, healthy and with a view of the sea this restaurant is a must stop. I can't wait to get back!

Title: Top place!
ReviewText: Best local breakfast, great flavor, top quality ingredients and the best coffee ever! Nice environment music included and the best service in town!

Title: Great option at Las Catalinas
ReviewText: Awesome food, great service. We ate at Pots &Bowls three times during our 5 days stay in Las Catalinas. Potato Hash was great, skirt steak was delicious.

Title: Amazing and friendly staff, great food and drinks
ReviewText: This place is amazing. Daniela and Roy are outstanding, the customer service is superb. The food is great and so many options to choose from. The drinks are to die for, great mixology, get the spicy maracuya margarita and you won’t regret it. I cant wait to come back here.

Title: Las Catalinas gem
ReviewText: Outstanding food. Generous portions. Impeccable service. Couldn't ask for a better dinner. The spicy passionfruit margarita is a real winner too! Thank you to our warm and friendly server for making our visit super special!

Title: Ceviche and delicious strawberry lemonade!
ReviewText: We ordered a Ceviche and a Strawberry Lemonade. The strawberry lemonade was very refreshing and tasted good lemon and strawberry. And delicious Ceviche, they've never tasted a ceviche like that. Also Carlos was very attentive to us, excellent service!

Title: Ceviche delicious
ReviewText: The ceviche is totally different, it's very good. The strawberry and peppermint drink had excellent taste! The waiter Carlos was very friendly!

Title: Excellent
ReviewText: Excellent location and service! We recommend it a thousand times. We went every day at different times because we loved the menu: breakfast, brunch and lunch.

Title: Best healthy restaurant in CR!
ReviewText: I love everything about this place!!! I went every day during our trip and all the food was delicious and very healthy. The people were the highlight though, they were super friendly and went beyond expectations to give us the best experience. This is now top of the list of my fave restaurants in CR! Thank youuuu! 🫶

Title: Brunch perfection
ReviewText: Brunch was amazing!! Great vibe for our girls trip - so many yummy options. We tried the crispy rice tuna, shashuka (sauce is AMAZING), breakfast scramble, and French toast. The pineapple juice and ice coffees were so creamy. Julie our server was fantastic! Can’t wait to come back again.

Title: Excellent Service
ReviewText: Excellent service, Jullie, and all your waitresses excellent people. The food is amazing, very good.  They attended us as soon as we arrived and have a lot of variety for the different needs of people (allergies, diets, etc).

Title: Healthy breakfast and deli
ReviewText: We came to breakfast as a family, the place is nice, the food very healthy and delicious. I want to stress the good care and hospitality, you feel at home.

Title: Great coffee shop with bomb food!
ReviewText: Great food and drinks. Chill spot to catch up on work as welll! Atmosphere is relaxing. Staff and service were amazing!!

Title: Great tasting food!
ReviewText: Delicious food and very nice personnel. Was there with my family and had a great time. I specially recommend the banana bread.

Title: Great place to eat
ReviewText: excellent service, very friendly staff, reasonable prices, the food was excellent and the location is amazing, we'll be back for sure!

Title: Great food and Service
ReviewText: Great spot for a light and healthy lunch. I had the Poke bowl and my wife had the Kale salad. Both were great and Daniella’s service was awesome.

Title: Breakfast in Guanacaste
ReviewText: Delicious and delightful breakfast spot.  Service was spectacular. Food just as good.  Nice retail items for purchase including clothing, art, and bath products.

Title: Delicious!
ReviewText: Wonderful spot! Juleicy was an amazing host and the food was delicious! We had the breakfast burrito, banana bread and smoothies. The atmosphere is vibrant yet laid back. Hope to be back!

Title: Best place in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: All delicious and the guys super friendly with the service. Tuna poke and pink lady are my recommendations. Go in the morning!

Title: Amazing
ReviewText: Great food and service! Highly recommend! The staff was amazing at getting us our drinks right away and only took a few min to get our food. They also gave us recommendation of what Places to check out in CR!

Title: 5 Star Service
ReviewText: The food was really good, the service was excellent. Julia is a superb server. We had a great time! The fish, ceviche and chicken plates were delicious.

Title: Superb food/place
ReviewText: Gamaliel treated us excellently!! The Delicious and very good quality food, very good service and next time we will return here without a doubt an excellent restaurant! 5 ⭐️

Title: Good breakfast
ReviewText: The breakfast is very good, varied, and Juleicy's attention was super friendly 👌🏼. The location is in front of the beach, very nice.

Title: Super
ReviewText: Super recommended. The food was too good and healthy. I ate a chifricoco and for starters a super good ceviche. The attention of Yuleicy.

Title: sensational
ReviewText: Service, food, and atmosphere is top tier. A must stop. Julie made our experience one of a kind. Thank you so much!!!!!!!

Title: Muy Rico! Great service!
ReviewText: Todo fue demasiado rico. Everything was amazing, Julie was very helpful recommending foods, activities and just great service overall. 10/10 Recommend the costarican breakfast

Title: Lovely Brunch
ReviewText: Beautiful ambiance and delicious food. Julie was great and took amazing care of us! Will definitely come back for more food and drinks.

Title: LOVE IT
ReviewText: my friends and I came for breakfast before hitting the beach. we had the nicest server, Julie! She gave us her recommendations and we ended up going with coffees, juices, and gallo pinto. She gave us travel recommendations and made the experience so great! Highly recommend coming here for 5 star fresh food and service! Thanks Julacy!!!!!

Title: Its the best part of Las Catalinas, best food in the resort.
ReviewText: Great simple well cooked breakfast and lunch spot, with lovely staff.  Their burger was fantastic as were the traditional breakfasts and burritos.

Title: It was a perfect afternoon, delicious, healthy food and Juleisi's very kind attention and the best recommendations!!
ReviewText: It was a perfect afternoon, delicious, healthy food and Juleisi's very kind attention and the best recommendations and suggestions, we would return again and again!!

Title: Tasty healthy food in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: Ate here twice during our stay; once for breakfast and once for dinner . Both meals were delicious.  Had the guac toast and gallo pinto for breakfast.  Amazing  Had chicken tacos and shared  chips with dip- also delicious.

Title: Great Place for light meal and drink
ReviewText: Most of the menu is gluten free including baked good. They have great fresh juices and mixology menu. We visited around 10am after a hike and the brunch was refreshing and perfect

Title: Great for a burger.
ReviewText: We came to this restaurant twice.  We had the burgers the first night and they were good.  Lunch was a bit disappointing as I order the Shakshouka and it was not what it should be.  It was more like an egg poached in campbells condensed tomato soup.  My daughter had the chicken burger and smoothy and it was ok.

Title: Food and experience at Pots
ReviewText: Excellent service, attention and fresh local food and highly recommended. Very nice place in contact with nature and nice vibes

Title: Excellent and rich
ReviewText: We had breakfast and dinner here. My husband ordered a gin and tonic which he did not like. The next day they made us a courtesy one with the instructions he had given. The manager was always attentive to making sure we were happy with everything. Delicious and excellent food for those who want to eat healthy and delicious on the beach. The friendly waiters. The comfortable and cozy place.

Title: Excellent place for a delicious meal
ReviewText: A super nice place and very good food, we arrived at the place looking for a delicious lunch and that is what we found, apart from the recommendations of her collaborator Valery, she was always attentive to making sure that we were comfortable with everything, excellent service and very delicious meal

Title: Las Catalinas Restaurant Excellent service, delicious food and beautiful place to enjoy a vacation
ReviewText: Beautiful place and delicious food, they exceeded my expectations, Valery's attention was great, we will definitely return on the next vacation

Title: Menu open all day
ReviewText: This place has special dishes for brunch, the service is very good and the food delicious, Valery served us very attentive and friendly. We will surely return.

Title: Lunch with friends
ReviewText: We visited Las Catalinas for the first time and found this restaurant. Excellent food and attention, especially from Valery

Title: Lunch as a couple
ReviewText: My partner and I visited Las Catalinas, a beautiful place to enjoy and hang out and enjoy a delicious meal. Will gave us a warm welcome which didn't make us feel at home. He recommended the tuna poke which was delicious and my girlfriend ordered a chicken caprese, everything was super delicious, the service was excellent, we will definitely return.

Title: Lunch in family
ReviewText: We went for a family lunch, the keto burger was delicious, terillaki chicken was very tasty, Willy's customer service was incredible and very friendly, the place was highly recommended.

Title: Delicious and fun
ReviewText: The food was delicious and the decoration of the place is very pretty. My charcoal lemonade had the perfect sweetness and the cappuccino was delicious too. Daniela, Víctor and Valery gave us a very fun experience for our friend who was having a bachelor party. I recommend it!!

Title: Best Restaurant in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: The best customer service in Las Catalinas! The food is amazing.  Prepare to never want to leave!  Just steps from the ocean, you can start your beach day or end it here.

Title: Good service !
ReviewText: Pots and bowls has a great atmosphere, the place is very nice and comfortable. We ordered a teriyaki chicken and a casado, both dishes were very tasty. For the atmosphere and staff the place is a 10/10.

Title: Prepare to be amazed!
ReviewText: If you’re looking for fresh, delicious and reasonably priced food with amazing service, look no further! The staff was incredibly friendly, remembered our names immediately and the manager was so friendly, she even came to our table to introduce herself to make sure we are happy. We will definitely be back and recommend this place to all of our friends and family.

Title: We loved the place!
ReviewText: The place is wonderful, the food is of very good quality, and we found the recommendations that the waiter made to us delicious, especially the Poke bowl. Excellent service. We will definitely go back!!!

Title: REALLY GREAT
ReviewText: Very kind staff and super great food! We got a quick snack of a chocolate bowl and banana bread. We will be back. Awesomeness all around♥️

Title: Excepcional atención y maridaje perfecto en Pots & Bowls
ReviewText: Quiero destacar la increíble atención que recibí de Valery; su recomendación de maridar la entraña con un Merlot fue simplemente perfecta. Ciertamente una experiencia gastronómica inolvidable en esta hermosa zona!, altamente recomendado. Gracias, Valery.

Title: Visita Pots Catalinas
ReviewText: El ambiente del restaurante muy bonito y acogedor, la comida riquísima, solo le sumaría otro plato fuerte de carnes 😋  Las bebidas riquísimas y el servicio excelente, tuve el placer que me atendiera Val, carisma y sonrisa como ninguno otro 🙌🏻 definitivamente repetiría

Title: Se los recomiendo
ReviewText: Me encantó el restaurante,su comida,pero lo más bonito fue la atención de parte de Valery, nos explicó el menú y fue super amable,recomendado

Title: Excelente atención y bebidas únicas
ReviewText: La gente es amable y con buen servicio al cliente, la comida deliciosa. Mi favorito el orzo miso con camarones. Los té fríos especiales de Gama en Bar súper buenos, y los cafés de Donnay súper ricos.  Recomendados!!

Title: Lo recomiendo 100%
ReviewText: Muy buen servicio de los chicos que atienden en especial Daniela Valerio Lopez, es muy atenta y servicial muchas Gracias chicos😊😊

Title: Great healthy fresh meal
ReviewText: This place is really good it takes a little to get your meal but everything is so fresh and you can tell they make it to order .

Title: Great dinner choice in Las Catalinas
ReviewText: Very friendly and helpful staff, great food choices and great tasting food. We went here 3 times, twice for brunch and once for dinner.  Excellent all those times.  Prices very reasonable.

Title: Ate here many times and always was great
ReviewText: Fresh food and super friendly staff.  They have interesting options and are open for breakfast, lunch and dinner.  Prices very reasonable for the quality of food and atmosphere right next to the beach.

Title: Great healthy Lunch options
ReviewText: During our stay in Las Catalinas, we've stopped by Pots & Bowls for lunch. They have outdoor and indoor seating. We enjoyed their healthy version of dishes and smoothies! They also offer take out in case you don't have time to enjoy your meals at the restaurant. Unfortunately, we didn't had a chance to try their breakfast but will try it out when we come back to Las Catalinas in a few years!

Title: Excellent for breakfast and lunch
ReviewText: We ate here for breakfast and lunch and enjoyed all our meals. Lots of fresh, healthy and flavorful options. I especially loved the tuna poke bowl. There is indoor, outdoor and outdoor covered seating with view of the beach. Staff is super friendly. Love that everyone asks what your name is before serving you.

Title: Great food! Great service!
ReviewText: The food is a bit pricey but really good. The staff was very friendly and they took the bother to memorize my name for every time I visited.

Title: Excellent, Fresh and Creative Food
ReviewText: A top restaurant at Las Catalinas.  The menu is varied with unique combinations of ingredients and varied options. Everything is fresh. The service is excellent. Loved this place!

Title: Air conditioning
ReviewText: On a very hot day, the air conditioned dinning area was appreciated. Good service. Limited menu but the chicken teriyaki bowl was pretty good.

Title: Bad service
ReviewText: Awful service, could not get my order right - staff unfriendly. Would not return, overrated place…..

Title: Boa comida e linda vista
ReviewText: Bom restaurante e um local precioso, com bom café da manhã, os preços são altos mas vale a penas a experiência. Fica dentro do complexo las Catalinas.
